error_signature: Loop Over Items only runs correctly for the first outer iteration
title: Nested Loop Over Items issue
symptom: When using a nested Loop Over Items, only the first batch of data from the outer loop is processed in the inner loop.
not_this_if: Using Split in Batches instead of Loop Over Items
root_cause: The Loop Over Items node maintains internal state, which causes issues when nested inside another loop. It only processes correctly for the first iteration of the outer loop, leading to incomplete data handling.
fix_steps: Open the inner Loop Over Items node settings.
Go to Options and enable Reset.
Set the Reset condition to an expression that checks the previous node, e.g., '{{ $prevNode.name === 'get_products_by_invoice' }}'.
Test the workflow to ensure both loops function as expected.
agent_instruction: Enable the Reset option in the inner loop and set the appropriate expression to handle nested iterations.
